design_philosophy: A magical, stunning ('stupendo') dating experience. Avoid standard corporate SaaS looks. Utilize a dark celestial palette (midnight blue, starlight gold) without relying on generic AI purple/teal gradients. Emphasize deep space, auroras, moonlight, and soft glowing accents.

rules: Headings (H1-H3) MUST use 'Cormorant Garamond' with tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). DO NOT use Inter or Roboto.
H1 size maximum is text-5xl sm:text-6xl. Ensure elegant, fluid typography.
Body text MUST use 'Outfit' (text-sm to text-base) for clean readability.
Overlines and small labels MUST be uppercase, text-xs, with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Tailwind p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers to provide breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.containers: All containers/cards must use the 'Crystal Glass' variant: bg-[#0D1526]/80 backdrop-blur-md, with a subtle border-white/10. Must have internal padding (e.g., p-6) to avoid text collision.
layout_and_spacing.grids: The 'Bacheca' (Profile Board) should use a bento-style or balanced grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 or 4) with gap-6.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#040710]/70 border-b border-white/10) to maintain context over scrolling magical backgrounds.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary CTA must be Solid Starlight Gold (bg-primary text-primary-foreground). Hover state must elevate slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and add a magical glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(230,201,152,0.3)]).
components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Use customized Shadcn UI components. Inputs should have bg-input/50, border-border, and focus states with focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary.
components_strategy.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog with a heavily blurred overlay (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm) to keep the ethereal feel.

hero_background.description: Starry night sky. MUST be used with a dark overlay (e.g., bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-b from-[#040710]/80 to-[#040710]) to ensure text readability.

aurora_accent.description: Subtle aurora borealis. Use as a blurred background image for the 'Bacheca' or specific feature sections.

profile_images.description: Magical night portrait of a user
Artistic portrait of a user illuminated by night lights

motion_and_effects.hover_states: All interactive elements must transition smoothly using duration-300 ease-out.
motion_and_effects.particles_and_3d: Implement tsparticles (or similar lightweight library) for a subtle floating stardust effect in the background of the main landing and bacheca pages. Ensure low opacity to prevent distraction.
motion_and_effects.glass_shimmer: Apply a subtle hover glow (box-shadow) on profile cards to emphasize the 'magical' interactions.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios against backgrounds. Use text-shadow on hero texts over images.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='google-login-btn', data-testid='profile-card-like').

pages_instructions.landing: Italian UI. Hero section needs an ethereal starlight background. Call to action should be 'Accedi alla Magia' or 'Entra'. MUST include both standard email/password form AND Emergent Google Auth button.
pages_instructions.bacheca: The 'Bacheca' (Profile Board) displays all users as magical cards. MUST include filters: 'Età' (Age), 'Genere' (Gender), 'Città' (City), 'Interessi' (Interests).
pages_instructions.home_dashboard: 'Il mio Profilo' (My Profile) page where users can upload photos (using object storage mock) and edit bio, interests, age, gender, and city.
pages_instructions.matches_and_chat: Implement a Like/Match system. When a mutual like occurs, show a 'Connessione Stellare' (Stellar Connection) notification. Include a basic chat interface between matched users.
pages_instructions.profile_detail: Clicking a card in the Bacheca opens a modal or detail page showcasing a photo gallery and full bio.
